info.name: Swell Frontend API
info.description:
Swell Frontend API — the client-safe, public-key-authenticated REST surface used from storefronts, single-page apps, and headless commerce experiences. Exposes a curated subset of the Backend API authorized with a public key plus a session token. Powers Swell.js, the React/Vue/Next storefront kits (Origin, Horizon, Verswell), and any custom JAMstack or SSR storefront. Resources include products, categories, carts, accounts, orders, subscriptions, payments, coupons, gift cards, store settings, currencies, localization, menus, and content pages.

Contact Support:
 Name: Swell Developer Support
